hero.badge: A hub for contemporary dental medicine
hero.subtitle: Advanced dental care with modern technology and specialist collaboration, delivering treatments close to international standards.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Because healthcare services in Kabul are often provided individually — not as a team — and without shared consultation among specialists, patient satisfaction suffers. Moaser Specialized Dental Hospital was established to change this. We operate as a fully equipped complex with modern facilities, specialist collaboration, and a commitment to evidence-based dentistry close to international standards.
about.feature1Desc: Collaborative approach with specialists across all dental disciplines.
about.feature2Desc: Equipped with cutting-edge digital dental technology and facilities.
about.feature3Desc: Scientific, evidence-based treatment protocols close to international standards.
about.feature4Desc: Trained, specialized personnel with advanced qualifications.
about.quote: "Our team strives to achieve success rates as close as possible to modern standards. While 100% success is not guaranteed in dental treatment, we maximize every effort for your satisfaction."

services.title: Comprehensive Dental Care
services.subtitle: From general treatments to cosmetic services, dental implants, maxillofacial surgery, and digital dentistry — everything you need in one place.
services.s1Desc: Jaw fractures, tumors, infections, partial jaw grafts, and cosmetic maxillofacial prostheses.
services.s2Desc: Various implant types, bone grafting, reconstruction surgery, and implant-supporting prostheses.
services.s3Desc: 3D scanning & printing, digital milling, clear aligner design, surgical guides, and Digital Smile Design.
services.s4Desc: Expert root canal therapy and comprehensive restorative dental treatments.
services.s5Desc: Ceramic veneers, composite veneers, digital smile design for your perfect smile.
services.s6Desc: Traditional braces and wire-free clear aligner orthodontics for dental correction.
services.s7Desc: Zirconia covers, E.max laminates, PFM & PFZ crowns, and various prosthetic solutions.
services.s8Desc: Teeth whitening, professional scaling, and 24/7 emergency dental and trauma services.
services.imgDigitalDesc: Advanced 3D scanning, printing, and Digital Smile Design

doctors.title: Expert Doctors
doctors.subtitle: Meet the skilled specialists dedicated to your dental health and well-being.
doctors.doc1Cred: PhD, MDS, MD | Fellowship: Implant, Endodontics

vision.title: Vision, Mission, Objectives & Values
vision.visionText: Moaser Specialized Dental Hospital, as a reputable scientific and professional institution, strives to become a reference hospital, a center for providing new services in the field of dental practice and stomatology at the national level, and a hub for the distribution of dental medicine and stomatology.
vision.missionText: Moaser Specialized Dental Hospital, relying on scientific capacity and human resources, and utilizing advanced technology with a focus on modern, creative, and innovative methods, provides diagnostic and precision services in dental practice and stomatology. By offering regular check-up services, we strive to improve society's perception of stomatology service centers, to stabilize the lost position of this sector, and to restore the credibility of stomatology practice. Precise and evidence-based scientific services are a major priority of this specialized center.
vision.goalsText: Given that the provision of health services in Kabul city is often done individually and non-collaboratively, relying on personal opinions without specialist consultation, coupled with limited modern facilities. We intend to establish a specialized team comprising multiple dental departments, within a well-equipped complex with advanced facilities. We will strive to provide effective, useful, and satisfying services to our patients.
vision.valuesIntro: Moaser Specialized Dental Hospital is committed to the following values and strives to put them into practice as much as possible:
vision.value1: Adherence to the sublime religion of Islam, ethical conduct, and the preservation of human dignity
vision.value3: Scientific and academic research and the production of medical knowledge and science
